hooks.command: echo '[Reminder] Strict TDD + zero-warning lint + JSONL logs before rereading code. Shell: detect via $FISH_VERSION/$PSVersionTable before a one-off command, never bash for that. Check git diff before commit.' >&2
if [ -d logs ]; then echo '[Reminder] A command failed — check logs/*.jsonl (grep level:ERROR) before rereading the entire codebase.' >&2; fi
